creator: ori@eigenstate.org
text:
Seems to be an issue talking to the render thread.

If it helps, I have an nvidia gpu.

$ bt
#0  _umtx_op_err () at /usr/src/lib/libthr/arch/amd64/amd64/_umtx_op_err.S:37
